name: telemetry baseline: detector that adds a new component (skill, agent, hook) MUST declare a `budget_impact_estimate:` block; absence rejected per O-0
command: mkdir -p skills/my-new-skill && printf 'name: my-new-skill\ndescription: x\n' > skills/my-new-skill/SKILL.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/budget-impact-required.sh"
